tasks.title: Create and align README.md with software industry standards
tasks.description: Create or modify README.md at the project root to include sections: Project Title, Description, Installation, Usage, Development, Testing, Contributing, License, and Contact. Follow common markdown conventions and best practices for clarity and completeness.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md contains all standard sections with clear instructions
tasks.expectedResult: README.md file exists with comprehensive and well-structured content following software industry standards

outputPlan.description: Standardized project README with essential sections and formatting

metadata.inputContext: Project root directory and existing README.md if any
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides clear project documentation aligned with industry standards

tasks.title: Configure Git repository with standard .gitignore and initial commit
tasks.description: Create or update .gitignore file at project root to exclude node_modules, build artifacts, environment files, and IDE configs. Initialize Git repository if not already initialized. Make initial commit with README.md and .gitignore files.
acceptanceCriteria: .gitignore file exists with standard ignore patterns
tasks.expectedResult: Git repository initialized with standard .gitignore and initial commit containing README.md and .gitignore

metadata.inputContext: Project root directory and README.md presence
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Sets up version control with standard ignore rules and initial commit

tasks.title: Add CodeGraph configuration for code analysis
tasks.description: Create codegraph configuration file (e.g., codegraph.config.json or codegraph.yaml) at project root with settings to analyze source code in src/ directory. Configure output directory and analysis rules aligned with industry best practices for code quality and maintainability.
acceptanceCriteria: CodeGraph config file exists with correct source and output paths
Config includes standard analysis rules for JavaScript/TypeScript projects
tasks.expectedResult: CodeGraph configuration file created with proper settings for project source analysis

outputPlan.description: CodeGraph configuration file for source code analysis

metadata.inputContext: Project source directory structure and codegraph tool requirements
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables automated code analysis aligned with industry standards

tasks.title: Validate project setup with lint and test commands
tasks.description: Run project linting and testing commands to verify that the project setup including README, Git, and codegraph configuration does not break existing code or tests. Use configured commands such as 'pnpm lint' and 'pnpm test' or equivalent.
acceptanceCriteria: Lint command exits with code 0 and no errors
Test command exits with code 0 and all tests pass
tasks.expectedResult: Project passes linting and testing without errors after setup changes

metadata.inputContext: Project source code and configuration files after setup tasks
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms project setup is stable and aligned with standards
